memoryArtifacts.headline: If you’ve reached this family line it’s the epitome of French Chivalry and Knighthood, the line of Royal Hunters (de Venables)- Carry On.

zh.Venables, Eure, Upper Normandy, France: 法國豪-諾門迪艾雲拿保斯
zh.Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France: 法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert de Blois於1020年出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾雲拿保斯時，他的父親Eudes II le Champenois de Blois35歲，母親Ermengarde d'Auvergne30歲。他於1050年之前與Petronilla de Fézensac結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1066年住在英國。他去世於1072年在法國諾門迪享年52歲。

zh-hans.Venables, Eure, Upper Normandy, France: 法国豪-諾門迪艾雲拿保斯
zh-hans.Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France: 法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert de Blois于1020年出生在法国豪-諾門迪艾雲拿保斯时，他的父亲Eudes II le Champenois de Blois35岁，母亲Ermengarde d'Auvergne30岁。他于1050年之前与Petronilla de Fézensac结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1066年住在英国。他去世于1072年在法国諾門迪享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Blois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Blois in Loire-et-Cher and, in some cases possibly also from a place of the same name in Jura. Compare   Deblois  .
French: nickname from the Old French adjective blois ‘lisping’.

variants.name: Bloise
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rolando, Salvatore, Biagio, Carmelo, Giulio.  Spanish Alejandro, Ines, Jose, Juan Antonio, Luis.
Italian (Calabria): from French Blois . The surname Bloise is also found in southern France (Bouches-du-Rhône) and in the Dominican Republic.
English (Suffolk): variant of   Blois  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Deblois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Rosaire, Amelie, Damien, Emile, Fernand, Herve, Jacques, Jean Guy, Monique, Ovide.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone from Blois (see Blois ).

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert de Blois was born in 1020, in Venables, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Eudes II le Champenois de Blois, was 35 and his mother, Ermengarde d'Auvergne, was 30. He married Petronilla de Fézensac before 1050. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He lived in England in 1066. He died in 1072, in Normandy, France, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert de Blois est né en 1020, à Venables, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Eudes II le Champenois de Blois, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde d'Auvergne, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Petronilla de Fézensac avant 1050. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il a vécu à Angleterre en 1066. Il est décédé en 1072, à Normandie, France, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert de Blois 1020 in Venables, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eudes II le Champenois de Blois 35 und seine Mutter Ermengarde d'Auvergne 30. Er hat vor 1050 Petronilla de Fézensac geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. 1066 hat er in England gelebt. Er starb 1072 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Blois è nato il nel 1020 nel Venables, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Eudes II le Champenois de Blois, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Ermengarde d'Auvergne, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Petronilla de Fézensac prima del 1050. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Vissuto a England nel 1066. Morì nel 1072, nel Normandie, Francia, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Bloisが1020年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアベナブレスで生まれた時，父Eudes II le Champenois de Bloisは35歳，母Ermengarde d'Auvergneは30歳であった。1050年以前にPetronilla de Fézensacと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1066年にはイギリスに住んでいた。彼は1072年にフランスノーマンディで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Blois(이)가 1020년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 베나블레스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eudes II le Champenois de Blois(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermengarde d'Auvergne(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1050년 이전 Petronilla de Fézensac(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 1066년도에 영국에서 살았다. 그는 1072년 프랑스 노먼디에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Blois nasceu em 1020, em Venables, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Eudes II le Champenois de Blois, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde d'Auvergne, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Petronilla de Fézensac antes 1050. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele viveu em Inglaterra em 1066. Ele faleceu em 1072, em Normandie, França, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert de Blois родился в 1020 г. в местности венаблесь, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Eudes II le Champenois de Blois было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde d'Auvergne, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Petronilla de Fézensac перед 1050 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он жил в местности Англия в 1066 году. Он умер в 1072 г. в местности норманди, Франция в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gilbert de Blois nació en 1020, en Venables, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Eudes II le Champenois de Blois, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Ermengarde d'Auvergne, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Petronilla de Fézensac antes de 1050. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Vivió en Inglaterra en 1066. Murió en 1072, en Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 52 años.
